tasks.subject: WebApi Task 1: Project scaffolding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the new JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi web project, register it in the solution, and confirm it boots an empty ASP.NET Core host.

**Files:**
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi.csproj
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Program.cs
- Modify: JoakimAnder.Toolbox.slnx

**Verify:** dotnet build -c Release

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi.csproj", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Program.cs", "JoakimAnder.Toolbox.slnx"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-web-api-example.md"}
```

tasks.subject: WebApi Task 2: Shared domain + ApiError DU + HTTP mapper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create entity records, ApiError discriminated union, and the cross-cutting ApiErrorMapping.ToHttpResult switch.

**Files:**
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Domain/Book.cs
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Domain/Author.cs
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Domain/Review.cs
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Domain/ApiError.cs
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Endpoints/ApiErrorMapping.cs

**Verify:** dotnet build -c Release

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Domain/Book.cs", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Domain/Author.cs", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Domain/Review.cs", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Domain/ApiError.cs", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Endpoints/ApiErrorMapping.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-web-api-example.md"}
```

tasks.subject: WebApi Task 3: Repositories with seeded data and simulated latency
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create three in-memory async [Singleton] repos with seed data and simulated 15-30ms latency. AddAsync returns Task<Entity?> (null on conflict, persisted entity on success).

**Files:**
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Repositories/BookRepository.cs
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Repositories/AuthorRepository.cs
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Repositories/ReviewRepository.cs

**Verify:** dotnet build -c Release

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Repositories/BookRepository.cs", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Repositories/AuthorRepository.cs", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Repositories/ReviewRepository.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-web-api-example.md"}
```

tasks.subject: WebApi Task 4: Read slices — ListBooks, GetBook, GetAuthor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add three pure-read slices (ListBooks, GetBook, GetAuthor), the route-group composer, and wire Program.cs so the API serves real responses end-to-end.

**Files:**
- Create: 9 slice files (Response/Handler/Endpoint per slice)
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Endpoints/EndpointRegistrationExtensions.cs
- Modify: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Program.cs

**Verify:** dotnet build -c Release; runtime smoke via curl

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Features/Books/ListBooks/", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Features/Books/GetBook/", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Features/Authors/GetAuthor/", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Endpoints/EndpointRegistrationExtensions.cs", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Program.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-web-api-example.md"}
```

tasks.subject: WebApi Task 5: GetBookDetail slice — FanOut showcase
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the cross-feature composition slice that fans out author + reviews in parallel after the root book lookup, wrapping FanOut with Result.TryAsync (exception -> ApiError.Upstream).

**Files:**
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Features/Books/GetBookDetail/Response.cs
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Features/Books/GetBookDetail/Handler.cs
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Features/Books/GetBookDetail/Endpoint.cs
- Modify: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Endpoints/EndpointRegistrationExtensions.cs

**Verify:** dotnet build -c Release; runtime smoke + time_total < 0.06s

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Features/Books/GetBookDetail/", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Endpoints/EndpointRegistrationExtensions.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-web-api-example.md"}
```

tasks.subject: WebApi Task 6: Write slices — CreateBook and CreateReview
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add two POST endpoints exercising ApiError.Validation and ApiError.Conflict via sync Bind-chained validation pipelines.

**Files:**
- Create: 8 slice files for CreateBook + CreateReview
- Modify: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Endpoints/EndpointRegistrationExtensions.cs
- Modify: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Program.cs

**Verify:** dotnet build -c Release; runtime smoke covering 400/201/409/404 paths

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Features/Books/CreateBook/", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Features/Reviews/CreateReview/", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Shared/Endpoints/EndpointRegistrationExtensions.cs", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Program.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-web-api-example.md"}
```

tasks.subject: WebApi Task 7: OpenAPI exposure + WebApi.http + final smoke
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Enable .NET 10's built-in OpenAPI at /openapi/v1.json, add project-root WebApi.http with sample requests, run final end-to-end smoke.

**Files:**
- Modify: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Program.cs
- Create: examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/WebApi.http

**Verify:** dotnet build -c Release; curl /openapi/v1.json returns 200; all WebApi.http requests execute as expected

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/Program.cs", "examples/JoakimAnder.Toolbox.Examples.WebApi/WebApi.http"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-web-api-example.md"}
```

tasks.subject: WebApi Task 8: README, CHANGELOG, and ROADMAP updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the Web API example in README and CHANGELOG, and add new 'Examples / supporting work' section to ROADMAP with Web API example (Complete) + Performance + stress-test suite (Not started, deferred).

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md
- Modify: CHANGELOG.md
- Modify: docs/ROADMAP.md

**Verify:** dotnet build -c Release; dotnet test all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "CHANGELOG.md", "docs/ROADMAP.md"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test", "plan": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-31-web-api-example.md"}
```
